label: capability search • skill • direct name match
notes: Probes the simplest skill recall shape: query carries the skill's category keyword ('debug') as a literal token. The built-in 'Debug Assistant' skill's name + keywords array both contain 'debug' / 'crash', so this should be a near-trivial pass. If even THIS fails, the skill index is dead — useful as a smoke-test before reading the trickier cases. All 7 built-in skills are enabled to keep the catalog realistic.
